creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Jun 19 15:40:25 2013
New Revision: 321282
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321282

Log:
  devel/ioncube: update to 4.4.1
  
  - Update to 4.4.1 [1]
  - Remove FreeBSD 7 support [1]
  - Trim Makefile header
  
  PR:		ports/179715 [1]
  Submitted by:	Svyatoslav Lempert <svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	culot / jpaetzel (mentors, implicit)

Modified:
  head/devel/ioncube/Makefile
  head/devel/ioncube/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/ioncube/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ioncube/Makefile	Wed Jun 19 15:39:18 2013	(r321281)
+++ head/devel/ioncube/Makefile	Wed Jun 19 15:40:25 2013	(r321282)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    ioncube
-# Date created:		Fri Feb 12 21:43:10 CET 2010
-# Whom:			Svyatoslav Lempert <svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com>
-#
+# Created by: Svyatoslav Lempert <svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	ioncube
-DISTVERSION=	4.4.0
+DISTVERSION=	4.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads3.ioncube.com/loader_downloads/ \
 		http://dl.ispsystem.info/ioncube/${DISTVERSION}/ \
@@ -28,10 +24,7 @@ DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/${DISTVERSION}
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 # Detect OS Version
-VER=	7
-.if ${OSVERSION} >= 800000
 VER=	8
-.endif
 .if ${OSVERSION} >= 900000
 VER=	9
 .endif
